title: GTA 6 cover revealed and pre-orders begin June 25
summary: Rockstar announces Grand Theft Auto VI pre-orders for June 25 and reveals the official game cover, boosting Take-Two's stock.

title: OtherSide lays off 17 employees and cancels Argos: Riders on the Storm
summary: The studio led by Warren Spector cancels its immersive sim Argos and lays off part of its staff to focus on Thick as Thieves.

title: Vampire Survivors reconsiders its Fortnite collaboration after AI-focused Unreal Engine 6 announcement
summary: Developer Poncle reconsiders its partnership with Epic Games after the State of Unreal event showed a focus on generative AI.

title: Valve releases SteamOS 3.8 with initial support for Steam Machines
summary: The new version of SteamOS includes compatibility with Steam Machine hardware and improves display performance.

title: High demand for Steam Controller delays pre-orders until 2027
summary: Valve extends delivery times for the Steam Controller, with new pre-orders not shipping until 2027.

title: New GTA 6 images show a vibrant, night-time Vice City
summary: Rockstar releases a never-before-seen clip and screenshot of Grand Theft Auto VI, highlighting its lighting and atmosphere.

title: Epic Games announces complete revamp of launcher to compete with Steam
summary: The company plans to revamp its PC store with features that have been standard in Steam for years, such as library and interface improvements.

title: Sony changes strategy for launching first-party games on PC due to lack of revenue
summary: A report reveals that PlayStation has adjusted its exclusives policy for PC because they did not meet earnings expectations.

title: Tim Sweeney warns Roblox could end gaming as we know it
summary: The CEO of Epic Games delivers a speech about the future of the industry, highlighting the threat of Roblox and the importance of Unreal Engine 6.

title: Palworld developer takes a stand against the use of AI in video games
summary: The developer of Palworld states that players don't want AI and that human creativity must take priority.

title: System Shock remake succeeded thanks to a rogue team at Nightdive
summary: After running out of funds, a group of developers continued working on the remake until completing it.

title: MSI unveils $1,800 gaming handheld and warns of a tough year
summary: The company launches a high-priced handheld console and forecasts difficult times for players and the industry.

title: Jim Carrey confirms his return for How the Grinch Stole Christmas sequel
summary: The actor will reprise his role in the Christmas movie sequel 25 years after the original.

title: GTA 6 cover art continues Rockstar's tradition of not showing crime
summary: Only once in the history of the series has the cover reflected the crime of the title, and GTA 6 continues that trend.

title: Donald Trump and White House use GTA 6 cover for political purposes
summary: The former US President and the White House post memes based on the Grand Theft Auto VI cover art to divert media attention.

title: Citizen Sleeper, the acclaimed sci-fi RPG, is free on Epic Games
summary: The award-winning indie game is available for free for a week on the Epic Games Store.

title: Pokémon Pokopia updates with Wish Upon a Jirachi event and patches
summary: The mobile game receives version 1.1.1 and includes a new limited-time Jirachi event.

title: Digimon Story Time Stranger adds graphics modes and Terriermon assistant
summary: The free game update arrives on July 9 with visual improvements and additional content.

title: Shinobi: Art of Vengeance will arrive on Switch 2 on September 24
summary: The new entry in the Shinobi saga will be available on Nintendo's console in autumn.

title: Global video game market exceeded $200 billion in 2025
summary: According to the Newzoo report, the video game industry achieved record revenue last year.
